acceptance.assertion: Self-review, external-review and Claude evidence objects have documented schema models or generated JSON Schemas with strict field boundaries.
Existing evidence loaders validate through the schema layer and preserve current failure messages or clearer equivalents.
Existing schema_version 1 evidence remains supported or has an explicit migration path.
Tests cover valid evidence, missing required fields, wrong primitive types, stale head/diff binding and unknown-field behavior where policy requires strictness.

goal: Introduce explicit machine-validated schema models for Grabowski self-review, external review and Claude evidence without changing the current gate policy semantics.

metadata.reason: Pydantic/JSON Schema modeling was intentionally deferred from PR #111 to avoid widening the gate hardening patch.
metadata.renumbered_from: GRABOWSKI-OPERATOR-SURFACE-V1-T014 during rebase because main already contains verified T014
metadata.verification_note: PR #341 introduced dependency-free machine-validated schema models for self-review, optional external-review and legacy Claude evidence, integrated the existing evidence loaders without changing required-versus-advisory gate semantics, preserved schema_version 1 compatibility, and was deployed from the exact merged main commit.

validation.github_ci: validate Python 3.10/3.12 and CodeQL passed on reviewed head

deployment.runtime_health: healthy; deployment complete; integrity valid; audit valid and writable; kill switch false

validated_acceptance.schema-models: PASS: One dependency-free schema model layer covers self-review, external review and Claude evidence and emits Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema with strict top-level field boundaries.
validated_acceptance.loader-integration: PASS: Required self-review validation is fail-closed; optional external and Claude structural failures remain advisory, preserving existing gate policy semantics.
validated_acceptance.migration-boundary: PASS: schema_version 1 remains the compatibility boundary; deprecated diagnostic self-review fields remain structurally accepted without regaining policy authority.
validated_acceptance.tests: PASS: 9 focused schema tests cover valid evidence, missing fields, primitive-type errors, unknown fields and stale head/diff binding; 97 existing gate tests and the 2471-test repository suite passed.

title: Model review evidence schemas
